privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for garmin_basecamp_env analyze_off_trail_detour task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are completely missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json and ground_truth.json output files. The expected export path, waypoint name, and distance thresholds exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and verifier script logic.
